profile.name: Sahil Chandel
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer & Systems Architect
profile.bio: I build high-performance web applications and distributed systems. Passionate about clean architecture, developer tooling, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible on the web.

projects.title: Order Processing SaaS
projects.description: Production-ready micro-SaaS with async queues, WebSockets, and full observability.
projects.longDescription: A high-concurrency micro-SaaS architecture designed for reliable asynchronous order processing. The system uses a decoupled 'Producer-Consumer' model where a Go-based API offloads heavy lifting to background workers via RabbitMQ. It implements distributed systems best practices including database-level idempotency to prevent duplicate charges, and at-least-once delivery guarantees for mission-critical reliability.
features: Strict idempotency using tenant-id/key constraints in Postgres
Fault-tolerant workers with exponential backoff retry logic
Real-time state transition streaming via WebSockets
Append-only event logging in Redis for sub-millisecond observability
Automated webhook dispatching for terminal state notifications
Prometheus metrics integration for API and Worker health

projects.title: ElasticSearch Engine
projects.description: Spring Boot application with autocomplete, fuzzy search, and optimized querying.
projects.longDescription: A robust search microservice built on Spring Boot and Elasticsearch v9. This project solves complex discovery problems by implementing specialized indexing strategies for 50+ diverse course types. It features a custom 'CourseDataLoader' that handles automated index mapping and bulk-indexing on startup, ensuring the search engine is always in sync with the underlying data source.
features: Advanced full-text search across multiple document fields
Instantaneous autocomplete using Elasticsearch Completion Suggesters
Typo-tolerant 'Fuzzy Search' logic with AUTO-fuzziness tuning
Multi-dimensional filtering (Price, Age-overlap, Category, and Date)
Automated index lifecycle management and data seeding at startup
Optimized pagination and sorting for sub-100ms response times

projects.title: Nazar Blogging Platform
projects.description: Clean, SEO-friendly blogging engine built with Go, MongoDB, and high-performance server-side templates.
projects.longDescription: Nazar is a lightweight yet powerful content management system designed for speed and discoverability. Built using Go's native net/http and html/template packages, it avoids heavy framework overhead while providing robust features like slug-based routing, full-text search, and a secure admin dashboard. The project leverages MongoDB for flexible data modeling and implements a responsive dark-themed UI with CSS variables for easy customization.
features: Dynamic SEO-friendly URL slug generation with collision prevention
Full-text search implementation for efficient article discovery
Automated pagination for articles and category-specific archives
Secure Admin Dashboard for article lifecycle management
Responsive card-based UI with a performance-first dark theme
Flash messaging system for real-time user feedback on actions

projects.title: Woods Indica E-Commerce
projects.description: Full-featured digital storefront with secure payments, real-time inventory, and multi-provider authentication.
projects.longDescription: A sophisticated e-commerce platform built with React and Redux Toolkit, designed to provide a seamless shopping experience. The application features a robust checkout flow integrated with Stripe, multiple authentication methods (Google OAuth & Guest sessions) via Firebase, and a data-driven dashboard using Chart.js for sales visualization. It emphasizes user accessibility and modern UI patterns using Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI.
features: End-to-end encrypted payment processing via Stripe API integration
Multi-channel Authentication (Google OAuth, Email/Password, and Guest access)
Centralized state management using Redux Toolkit for cart and user persistence
Interactive data visualization for sales and product metrics using Chart.js
Automated customer communication workflows powered by EmailJS
Responsive, mobile-first design architecture with Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI components

projects.title: CommonTea Social Network
projects.description: A secure, ethical social platform featuring automated moderation, RBAC, and community-driven engagement.
projects.longDescription: CommonTea is a full-stack social networking ecosystem designed to prioritize user safety and data privacy. Built with the MERN stack, it implements a sophisticated three-tier User Role system (Admin, Moderator, General User). The platform features an automated content reporting workflow, secure JWT-based authentication via Passport.js, and real-time email notifications. It solves modern social media challenges by focusing on transparency and ethical community management rather than intrusive algorithms.
features: Granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for Admins and General Users
Full social graph implementation (Follow/Unfollow logic and User Discovery)
Secure Authentication pipeline using JWT, Passport.js, and Crypto-js encryption
Community Moderation engine allowing users to report posts for Admin review
Dynamic Post & Comment management with real-time state updates via Redux
Automated transactional emails for user activity using Nodemailer

experience.description: Engaged in an intensive industrial training program focused on building scalable web applications using the MERN stack and Go.
highlights: Collaborated on production-level features using React.js and Node.js
Optimized backend API endpoints for better response times and data handling
Applied Agile methodologies and version control best practices in a team environment

experience.description: Advanced studies in software engineering, data structures, and system design. Bridged the gap between technical theory and complex implementation.
highlights: Developed 'Woods Indica' e-commerce platform using React, Redux, and Firebase
Built 'Nazar' blogging engine to explore Go-based backend systems and MongoDB
Deepened expertise in full-stack architecture and third-party API integrations (Stripe, Google Auth)

experience.description: Three-year intensive diploma program focused on the fundamentals of computer hardware, networking, and core programming concepts.
highlights: Mastered fundamental programming logic in C/C++ and Java
Developed a strong foundation in Database Management Systems (DBMS) and Web Basics
Consistently ranked in the top tier of the cohort for technical laboratory projects
